summary: Tested app version update notification system. Backend: 12/12 tests pass for GET/PUT /api/app-version. Frontend: Update prompt modal shows correctly when backend reports newer version (2.0.0 vs 1.0.0), 'Maybe Later' dismiss works, modal does NOT show when versions match. Regression: All 21 existing holiday API tests pass (/api/countries, /api/compare, /api/health, /api/holidays).

issues: React Native 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated warning in console (pre-existing from iteration 1)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/app-version returns empty values for minVersion and forceUpdate when doc not found in MongoDB (lines 601-609 server.py). Consider returning default minVersion='1.0.0' and forceUpdate=False to match the Pydantic model defaults.
useUpdateCheck.ts uses Constants.expoConfig?.version for CURRENT_VERSION - this is correct for Expo apps but ensure app.json version is kept in sync with actual releases.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 flows: prompt shows, dismiss works, no prompt when versions match)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 — app update notification system test. All new /api/app-version endpoints (GET/PUT) work correctly. Frontend UpdatePrompt modal shows when backend latestVersion > app version (1.0.0), 'Maybe Later' dismisses modal, modal does NOT show when versions match. testID='update-now-button' and testID='update-later-button' are properly rendered as data-testid in web. Version was reset to 1.0.0 at end of tests.
